feed.title: Bruno Russo
feed.subtitle: A minimal, portfolio, sidebar, bootstrap Jekyll theme with responsive web design and focuses on text presentation.

entry.title: Testing Amazon Macie
entry.summary: Introduction The objective of this post is to do tests with Amazon Macie, building Custom Data Identifiers with REGEX expression to identify sensitive data. Amazon Macie has a 30-day free trial for bucket-level evaluation. However, pay attention to additional costs. To more information, access: https://aws.amazon.com/macie/pricing/ The information explained in this article is basic and does n...

entry.title: Building Jekyll with codebuild on AWS

link.title: Building Jekyll with codebuild on AWS

entry.summary: An example of CodeBuild to build a static site by Jekyll. Architecture Resources AWS used in this deploy: CodeCommit CodeBuild CodePipeline S3 buildspec.yml version: 0.1 phases: install: commands: - apt-get update - apt-get install build-essential - apt-get install zlib1g-dev - gem install jekyll:4.2.0 - gem install rouge:3.26.0 - ...

entry.title: Training Big Data on AWS
entry.summary: This week, I’d opportunity to participate in one more AWS official training, sponsored by the company. The course: Big Data on AWS. Abou the course: Big Data on AWS introduces you to cloud-based big data solutions such as Amazon Elastic MapReduce (EMR), Amazon Redshift, Amazon Kinesis and the rest of the AWS big data platform. In this course, we show you how to use Amazon EMR to process data...

entry.title: Treinamento Advanced Architecting on AWS
entry.summary: Na última semana tive a oportunidade em realizar mais um treinamento AWS, oferecido pela empresa. O treinamento é o Advanced Architecting on AWS. Sobre o Treinamento: In this course, each module presents a scenario with an architectural challenge to be solved. You will examine available AWS services and features as solutions to the problem. You will gain insights by participating in proble...

entry.title: Certificação AWS Developer Associate
entry.summary: Após um período de estudos, dedicação e compreemsão dos familiares, mais uma conquista. AWS Certified Developer - Associate conquistada! AWS Certified Developer – Associate Recursos utilizados para esta conquista Treinamentos da Udemy Certificação AWS Desenvolvedor - Associate - 2021 AWS Certified Developer Associate Exam Training 2021 [NEW] Meu resumo para a p...
